stemHtml:
Choose the correct statement concerning a take-off planning with the following limiting masses established:

FL limit: 170 000 kg
Climb limit: 150 000 kg
Tyre limit: 190 000 kg
Obstacle limit: 192 000 kg
CG limit: 185 000 kg

options.a: The MTOM can be increased beyond 185 000 kg.
options.b: The MTOM can be increased beyond 192 000 kg.
